creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-28 23:36:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    biology              Makefile 
  Added files:
    biology/p5-Bio-SCF   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Bio::SCF module allows you to read and update (in a restricted
  way) SCF chromatographic sequence files. It is an interface to
  Roger Staden's io-lib. See the installation directions for further
  instructions.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Bio-SCF/
  
  PR:             ports/138263
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.114     +1 -0      ports/biology/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/biology/p5-Bio-SCF/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/biology/p5-Bio-SCF/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/biology/p5-Bio-SCF/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/biology/p5-Bio-SCF/pkg-plist (new)
